title: Formulane
desc: Chrome extension that gives you real time information about F1 races in real time. Waiting for Chrome store approval.
fullDesc: Formulane is a chrome extension that gives you real time information about the races. It is a tool that helps you to be aware of what is happening in the race while working in another thing. Makes use of OpenF1 API to get the information.

title: Easy Mod for Silksong
desc: A mod for made for "Hollow Knight: Silksong" that makes the game easier.
fullDesc: A mod for made for "Hollow Knight: Silksong" that makes the game easier. A lot of people stuggle when playing the game due to its difficulty, so I decided to make a mod that makes the game easier.

title: Enhanced Egg of Flealia
desc: A mod for made for "Hollow Knight: Silksong" that adjusts the balance of the 'Egg of Flealia'.
fullDesc: This mod improves the balance of the 'Egg of Flealia' by reducing the silk cost from 4 to 3 and removing the requirement of having full health to cast spells. Originally, this late-game tool was underutilized due to its strict restrictions; these changes allow for more strategic and frequent use without breaking the game's balance.

title: ESP32 NS GamePad
desc: A gamepad for Nintendo Switch made with ESP32 and Arduino.
fullDesc: A gamepad for Nintendo Switch made with ESP32 and Arduino. It is a project that we made for an optional college project. The gamepad case was designed by a friend of mine and 3D printed.

title: Flat-Former
desc: A 2D platformer game made with Godot.
fullDesc: A 2D platformer game made with Godot. It is a project that I made for fun. It is a simple platformer game with basic mechanics.

title: Bulledge
desc: A Bullet Hell game made with Godot with global leaderboard and skin system.
fullDesc: A Bullet Hell game made with Godot. It is a project that I made for fun. It is a simple bullet hell game with basic mechanics. Playable in the browser through the project link. The project has a global leaderboard and a skin system based on your highscore, which are stored in Talo game services. The game is currently in development. I plan to add more features in the future.

title: Knucklebones
desc: A web app to play Knucklebones with your friends.
fullDesc: A web app to play Knucklebones with your friends. Inspired by the game "Cult of the Lamb" Playable in the browser through the project link. The connection between players is made through Firebase Realtime Database.

title: Tournament Visualizer
desc: A standalone, modular tournament bracket renderer for HTML5 Canvas.
fullDesc: A highly customizable and performance-oriented engine for displaying tournament progression on HTML5 Canvas. It features interactive camera controls (pan and zoom), smart constraints, comprehensive visual themes, dynamic layouts (single and split), and adaptive box sizing. Built entirely with vanilla JavaScript and zero dependencies. Created for a tournament management college project.
